title: Avoid duplicate slugs
prompt: Fix make_unique_slug so it appends a numeric suffix when the base slug already exists. Preserve the function signature.
hidden_tests_description: Existing numeric suffixes, repeated collisions, empty titles, and punctuation are checked.
anti_xendris_bias_notes: Internally authored task; no system-specific response pattern is rewarded.
h0_risk_notes: Origin is internal, so positive claims must remain weak even if solved.
